title: CreateVersionRequest
description: Request payload for creating a generic xRegistry Version entity. Create is strictly idempotent: if every field matches the latest Version of the parent Resource (including labels), the latest Version is returned; otherwise a new Version is created.

groupId.description: Group identifier. Uses the default if not specified.

versionId.description: Version identifier. If omitted, the server determines the versionId.

description.description: A human-readable summary of the purpose of the entity.

documentation.description: A URL to additional information about this entity.

icon.description: A URL to a graphical icon for the owning entity.

labels.description: Queryable Key Value pairs to be added to the Version.

ancestor.description: The versionId of this Version's ancestor if it has an ancestor.

contentType.description: Content type of the Version document.

format.description: Format identifier of the Version document (resource-type-specific, e.g. `JsonSchema/draft-07`, `JSON-LD/1.1`, `WoT-TM/1.1`).

document.description: Base64-encoded document content for the Version. The interpretation (schema, thing description, thing model, etc.) is determined by the Resource type.

resourceLabels.description: Queryable Key Value pairs to be added to the parent Resource. The parent Resource is implicitly created if it doesn't already exist.
